name: Tabs
description: This functionality represents what can be described as a "component within a component."

fields.name: content
fields.description: Primary authored content. Follow the sidekick block page for the exact table/content shape and examples.

usageNotes: The tabs component is designed to showcase various components across different tabs. For instance, in the first example, it is integrated with the accordion component to create a "section requirement" section.
Documented sample names: Tabs with accordion, Tabs with various components.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
